name: @soa-harness/langgraph-adapter
description: SOA-Harness adapter for LangGraph.js — wraps an existing LangGraph StateGraph so the resulting runtime satisfies §18.5 Adapter Conformance (Core profile). Pre-dispatch permission interception per §18.5.2; event mapping per §14.6. Ships a `soa-langgraph-adapter-demo` binary that stands up a self-contained two-Runner composition for validator probing.
